title: Ge with macron
summary: Ge with macron (Г̄ г̄; italics: Г̄ г̄) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. It was used in the Karelian language in 1887, where it represented the voiced velar stop /ɡ/, the same pronunciation of Г where it is commonly used.
text: Ge with macron (Г̄ г̄; italics: Г̄ г̄) is a letter of the Cyrillic script. It was used in the Karelian language in 1887, where it represented the voiced velar stop /ɡ/, the same pronunciation of Г where it is commonly used.
